lead: Innovations in health technology are transforming how we access care and manage our health, from video consultations to AI-driven health coaching.

stories.title: Whoop will soon offer users in-app video consultations with licensed clinicians
stories.summary: Whoop is set to enhance its fitness tracking app by integrating in-app video consultations with licensed clinicians. This feature will allow users to share their health data directly with healthcare professionals, enabling personalized advice and support. This move reflects a growing trend of blending technology with healthcare to improve patient outcomes.

stories.title: Google built a 99 dollar AI health coach. Whoop responded with real doctors.
stories.summary: In a competitive response to Google's introduction of a low-cost AI health coach, Whoop announced its plan to offer real-time consultations with licensed doctors. This juxtaposition highlights the ongoing debate in health tech about the effectiveness of AI versus human expertise in managing personal health.

stories.title: How climate change makes your allergies worse
stories.summary: Recent studies reveal that climate change is exacerbating allergy seasons, leading to increased pollen levels and longer exposure times. This environmental health issue underscores the interconnectedness of climate and public health, as rising temperatures and changing weather patterns contribute to worsening allergy symptoms for many individuals.

stories.title: Beyond prevention: Protecting patient care through cyber recovery
stories.summary: As cyberattacks on healthcare systems become more prevalent, organizations are shifting their focus from prevention to recovery. This article discusses the importance of developing robust recovery strategies to ensure patient care continuity and data integrity in the face of potential disruptions caused by cyber threats.

stories.title: Google Is Rebranding the Fitbit App to ‘Google Health’
stories.summary: Google is rebranding its Fitbit app to Google Health, consolidating its health and fitness tracking services under one umbrella. This strategic move aims to streamline user experience and enhance integration across Google's health-related offerings, reflecting a broader trend of tech companies investing in health management tools.

stories.title: What Is a Healthy Resting Heart Rate?
stories.summary: Understanding your resting heart rate can provide valuable insights into your fitness and overall health. This article explains how to measure your resting heart rate and what the numbers mean, emphasizing its importance as a simple yet effective health metric.

stories.title: The Best Cat Water Fountains of 2026: Petlibro, Petkit, Oneisall
stories.summary: Keeping pets hydrated is crucial for their health, and this guide reviews the best cat water fountains available in 2026. The right fountain not only encourages cats to drink more water but also contributes to their overall well-being, highlighting the importance of pet health in the broader health conversation.

stories.title: NHS to close-source hundreds of GitHub repos over AI, security concerns
stories.summary: The NHS plans to close-source numerous GitHub repositories due to rising concerns over AI and security. This decision reflects the ongoing challenges healthcare organizations face in balancing innovation with the need to protect sensitive data, particularly in an era of increasing cyber threats.
